top_signals.title: EU Competition Chief Warns Governments Not to Stymie Bank Deals
top_signals.summary: The European Union’s competition chief has warned nations against overusing tactics such as citing security risks to stymie bank deals needed to boost the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth
top_signals.summary: Global markets operator Cboe has launched its first prediction markets products to meet consumer demand in the fast growing sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Senate Democrats urge Republicans to hold hearings on Trump family crypto ties to Abu Dhabi royalty
top_signals.summary: Top Democrats are calling for congressional hearings into President Donald Trump’s family crypto venture and Abu Dhabi royalty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: HSBC bags £135m from former Silicon Valley Bank as job cuts push up restructuring bill
top_signals.summary: The rescued UK wing of Silicon Valley Bank has paid another bumper dividend to HSBC as it racked up costs amid a sweeping restructure. HSBC Innovation Banking – the branding bestowed on the collapsed Silicon Valley Bank UK (SVBUK) – was taken over by Europe’s largest lender in March 2023 as ministers, regulators and banking [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
